error_signature: Authorization failed - please check your credentials
title: Gemini API authorization failure
symptom: When attempting to connect to the Gemini API, n8n displays 'Authorization failed - please check your credentials'. This indicates that the provided API credentials are not being accepted.
not_this_if: Credentials are valid and working in other applications
root_cause: The error occurs when the API keys used for authentication are not recognized by the Gemini API. This can happen if the keys are generated from the wrong source or if there are restrictions on the keys that prevent them from being used with n8n.
fix_steps: Generate a new API key from the AI Studio at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey
Use this new key in the n8n Gemini API node settings
Save the workflow and attempt to connect again
agent_instruction: Generate a new API key from AI Studio and update the Gemini API node settings in n8n.
